description: Breathing stays more delicate and needs steady care.
treatmentHint: Keep the pet rested, hydrated, and medically supported.

description: Recurring low-grade sickness that responds to care and hygiene.
treatmentHint: Baths, grooming, and medicine help keep this under control.

description: Feeding can become uncomfortable if neglected for too long.
treatmentHint: Grooming, medical care, and timely feeding reduce the strain.

description: Comfort and cleanliness drop faster without proper care.
treatmentHint: Bathing and comfort-focused care reduce flare-ups.

description: Movement and aging feel heavier when fitness falls behind.
treatmentHint: Balanced play and doctor visits help keep movement easier.

description: Poor hygiene can quickly become a health problem.
treatmentHint: Baths, grooming, and medicine keep this manageable.

description: Illness hits harder and recovery can take longer.
treatmentHint: Rest, medicine, and doctor care matter more than usual.

description: Comfort and appetite drift down if care gets inconsistent.
treatmentHint: Grooming and medical care help keep it from worsening.

description: Heavy exercise and dirty conditions cause quicker strain.
treatmentHint: Balanced exercise, cleaning, and doctor care reduce flare-ups.

description: Overfeeding and low exercise make movement and aging worse.
treatmentHint: Improve exercise, hydration, and balanced feeding.

description: Not eating enough weakens health and speeds biological aging.
treatmentHint: Feed consistently and support recovery with care.

description: Chronic neglect leaves the pet withdrawn and harder to motivate.
treatmentHint: Play, affection, comfort, and steady routine help.

description: Low affection and comfort create persistent tension.
treatmentHint: Frequent affection, rest, and doctor care reduce it.

description: Low fitness or rough care slows the pet down.
treatmentHint: Balanced exercise, rest, and doctor care improve it.

description: Overwork and poor rest drag down recovery and mood.
treatmentHint: Rest and comfort should come first.

description: Too much strain when unhealthy causes a lingering setback.
treatmentHint: Rest, medicine, and doctor care help it clear.
